title: Obsidian Hunters RPG
description: Explore, battle and get some nice loot! An "aRPG-light" inspired Minecraft
body:
# 🪓 OBSIDIAN HUNTERS RPG
**An aRPG inspired Adventure in Minecraft** 
**WIP**

![[AI GENERATED] Steve fighting a horde of enemies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5289a36838f0356f93795b927586dac2f3f5006.jpeg)



Dive into a loot-driven, action-packed Minecraft experience where every battle makes you stronger, every dungeon hides legendary treasures, and only the fiercest warriors survive.

## 🔥 WHAT AWAITS YOU:

- **🏰 Massive Dungeons** – Explore ever-changing labyrinths filled with traps, puzzles, and waves of enemies.
- **⚔️ Brutal Combat** – Prepare to die a lot, learn to time your shield block, wield magical weapons with unique abilities and unleash devastating skills. The more you fight the stronger you get
- **📦 Tiered-Style Loot** – Guns, swords, magic relics—all with randomized stats and rarity tiers.
- **📈 RPG Progression** – Level up, unlock talents, and customize your playstyle.
- **👹 Epic Boss Fights** – Test your strength against colossal foes with deadly mechanics.

[SCREENSHOT: A player standing before a giant boss, mid-fight, with intense particle effects.]

## HARD COMBAT
Mobs will mow you down very quick; play carefully.

## 💎 WILL YOU BECOME LEGEND?

Gear up, sharpen your blades, and step into the darkness. The hunt is on.

[SCREENSHOT: A victorious player surrounded by loot, holding a glowing legendary weapon.]
